character.name:
TRUE pixel art creature, 16-bit JRPG dark fantasy horror. ROTTED
UNDEAD GHOUL CORPSE creature, NOT a living human. STRICT FRONT-FACING
POSE for 8-direction rotation.

CREATURE TYPE — ROTTED UNDEAD CORPSE (CRITICAL):
- This is a DECAYED CORPSE-like creature, NOT a living human
- Entire body (face, neck, hands, torso, legs) is THE SAME pale
  gray-green rotted flesh tone — uniformly rotted skin throughout
- NO human-colored skin anywhere — ABSOLUTELY NO normal peach/beige/
  tan/pink human skin tone on any body part including the face
- Face skin is IDENTICAL to body skin: pale gray-green rotted flesh

POSE — ABSOLUTELY CRITICAL:
- SOUTH-FACING base sprite for 8-direction rotation
- Body squared toward viewer, shoulders parallel
- Head looks straight forward at camera
- Hunched stalking posture, slightly leaning forward
- Both feet visible, slight crouch stance

PROPORTIONS:
- Small hunched undead corpse, gaunt skeletal frame
- ~5-head ratio (smaller than player), thin emaciated body
- Slightly shorter than player (~80% height)

FACE — UNDEAD MINIMALIST (gray-green rotted skin, NOT human skin):
- Face skin tone: PALE GRAY-GREEN ROTTED FLESH (same as body, NOT
  human peach/beige)
- HOLLOW BLACK EYE SOCKETS with faint DIM RED PINPRICKS deep inside
  (no white sclera, just void with red glow)
- NO mouth, NO nose — face surface is decayed gray-green skin
- Subtle darker decay patches on face for texture
- Sharp 1-pixel dark outline around eye sockets

HAIR:
- Sparse stringy gray-black hair, mostly bald with patches
- Tattered cloth wrapping around the head

BODY AND EQUIPMENT:
- Pale gray-green rotted flesh with visible darker decay patches
  across entire body (face, arms, torso, legs all same tone)
- Tattered cloth wrappings around waist and arms (no armor)
- Clawed bony hands held forward in creeping pose
- Bare feet with long claw nails

COLOR PALETTE — STRICT:
- Dim red eye glow is the ONLY saturated accent
- ENTIRE body INCLUDING FACE uses limited palette ~14 colors of:
  pale gray-green rotted flesh (face + body), darker green-gray
  decay patches, dirty bone white claws, charcoal cloth, dim red eyes
- ★ ABSOLUTELY NO human skin tones (peach, beige, tan, pink) ANYWHERE
  on the sprite — face must use the SAME gray-green tone as the body

RENDERING:
- Single black outline, no anti-aliasing, sharp pixel edges
- Basic flat shading, NO smooth gradients

CLEAN OUTPUT — STRICT:
★ CLEAN SOLID COLOR SHAPES ONLY
★ NO white specks, NO dust particles, NO sparkles
★ TRUE transparent PNG (alpha=0)
★ NO shadow on the ground
